name: MultiLanguage_EnglishTrackSelected_CompletesWithNonEmptyTranscript
statusMessage:
Expected string to be the same string because tstMULTI001 has an English caption track and should complete without translation, but they differ at index 0:

  "failed"
  "completed"
   ↑ (expected).
